title: Payment
description: A payment resource tracking financial transactions and PSP interactions for an order.

version.description: Current version for optimistic concurrency control.

interfaceId.description: Payment identifier as reported by the PSP.

transactions.description: List of financial transactions associated with this payment.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the payment was created.

lastModifiedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the payment was last modified.
